name: net_connection_win_domain_telegram_api_non_browser_access
raw_query: any where destination.domain:"*api.telegram.org*" and (not (process.executable:"*\\brave.exe" or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe")) or process.executable:"*\\maxthon.exe" or (process.executable:"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeWebView\\Application\\*" or process.executable:"*\\WindowsApps\\MicrosoftEdge.exe" or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"))) or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*")) and (process.executable like~ ("*\\msedge.exe", "*\\msedgewebview2.exe"))) or process.executable:"*\\opera.exe" or process.executable:"*\\safari.exe" or process.executable:"*\\seamonkey.exe" or process.executable:"*\\vivaldi.exe" or process.executable:"*\\whale.exe"))
